sections.heading: How to Use Payoneer to Pay for Orders
sections.text: Blog > How to Use Payoneer to Pay for Orders How to Use Payoneer to Pay for Orders by: Mila Jan 13,2026 12696 Views 28 Comments Posted in Help Center PCBWay now supports Payoneer as a payment method for your orders. Payoneer is a secure and convenient way to pay for your orders. This guide will walk you through the steps to complete your payment quickly and safely. Instructions： 1. On the order page, select “Payoneer” as the payment method and click “Place Order.” A awaiting payment order package will be created. 2. Our sales representative will send you a Payoneer payment link via email. If you do not receive it, please contact your sales representative or find their contact in the top-rig...

sections.heading: Instructions：
sections.text: PCBWay now supports Payoneer as a payment method for your orders. Payoneer is a secure and convenient way to pay for your orders. This guide will walk you through the steps to complete your payment quickly and safely. Instructions： 1. On the order page, select “Payoneer” as the payment method and click “Place Order.” A awaiting payment order package will be created. 2. Our sales representative will send you a Payoneer payment link via email. If you do not receive it, please contact your sales representative or find their contact in the top-right corner of your account page. 3. Click the payment link to go to the Payoneer payment page. If you are a new user, you will need to sign up for a Pa...
